pr.title: Non-record: Knowledge Distillation - A Negative Result (val_bpb=1.152)

output.summary: Cached top-32 teacher logits to run soft KL distillation with alpha/temp sweeps, probing whether added per-step overhead ever beats cached-hard-label training.
techniques: Cached teacher logits (top-32) for soft KL guidance
Compared hard vs soft distillation mixing ratios
Tracked distillation vs baseline across 10m and 2h schedules
